name: Chocolate Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and chocolate in a 3-quart heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in sugar, sweetened condensed milk, and Karo until well blended.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the mixture reaches a firm ball stage (248°F) in about 15-18 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in chopped nuts and vanilla extract.
5. Pour into a well-buttered 9-inch square pan.
6. Allow to cool until firm, then cut into 1-inch squares.
7. Wrap the caramels individually in plastic wrap.
8. Store in a cool place.
Makes approximately 2 1/2 pounds.
